title: helia mathewsii
intro: Helia mathewsii is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of certain bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helia mathewsii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of Helia mathewsii can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
